name: ChatGPT
tagline: The world's most popular AI chatbot
description: ChatGPT is an AI-powered chatbot by OpenAI that can write, code, analyze, and answer almost anything. Used by over 100 million people worldwide.

name: Midjourney
tagline: Turn text into stunning AI artwork
description: Midjourney is the leading AI image generation tool. Create photorealistic images, illustrations, and artwork just by describing what you want.

name: Claude
tagline: Anthropic's helpful and honest AI assistant
description: Claude is an AI assistant by Anthropic known for being safe, helpful, and honest. Great for writing, analysis, coding, and long documents.

name: Jasper AI
description: Jasper helps marketing teams write blog posts, ads, emails, and social media content 10x faster using AI. Trusted by 100,000+ businesses.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: GitHub Copilot suggests code and entire functions in real time inside your editor. Supports all major languages and IDEs.

name: ElevenLabs
description: ElevenLabs creates the most realistic AI voices for audiobooks, podcasts, videos, and voiceovers. Clone any voice or choose from 1000+ pre-made voices.

name: Runway ML
description: Runway lets you generate, edit, and transform videos using AI. Create stunning video content from text prompts or existing footage.

name: Notion AI
description: Notion AI helps you write, summarize, translate, and brainstorm directly inside Notion. The smartest upgrade to your existing workspace.

name: Perplexity AI
description: Perplexity is an AI search engine that gives you direct answers with cited sources. Better than Google for research and quick facts.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Stable Diffusion is a free, open-source image generation model you can run locally or use online. Unlimited image generation at no cost.

name: Copy.ai
tagline: AI writing for sales and marketing
description: Copy.ai generates high-converting copy for ads, emails, product descriptions, and more. Loved by over 10 million marketers.

name: Otter.ai
description: Otter.ai automatically transcribes meetings, interviews, and lectures in real time. Never take notes again.
